productDisplayName: Basics Men Navy Printed Polo T-shirt
description: Composition Navy blue polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with grey ribbed and red tipped cuffs, red ribbed and navy tipped collar with tape detailing on the inseam, rugged chest placket, quilted stitches on the shoulders, appliqued numbering on the upper right chest, appliqued football on the upper left chest with embroidered lettering, appliqued panel on the upper back and a vented hem Fitting Fitted Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Hang dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print or embroidery The appliqued elements on the chest and back in classic colours add rugged styling to this polo neck T-shirt from basics, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11' and shoulders 17.5"
